_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in neurofibromatosis 1: development and validation of a tool dedicated to cutaneous neurofibromas in adults
_publications._context: The cNF-Skindex is an 18-item questionnaire, including three domains: 'functioning', 'emotions', and 'symptoms'. Each item is scored on a 7-point Likert scale

_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex
_publications._context: Translation, cultural adaptation and validation of the cNF-Skindex into Dutch

basicInfo.description: 18-item questionnaire assessing quality of life in individuals with NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas across three domains: functioning, emotions, and symptoms; scored on a 7-point Likert scale
basicInfo.psychometricProperties: Intraclass Correlation Coefficient 0.96; external validity: correlated with EQ-5D-5L (N = 193, r 0.38, p < 0.001) and MYMOP2 (N = 210, r 0.58, p < 0.001)
basicInfo.licensingRequirements: Copyright belongs to the Regents of University of California
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Dermatology, National Referral Center for Neurofibromatoses, Henri Mondor Hospital, AP-HP; Université Paris-Est Créteil (UPEC); INSERM U955
